titles.en: Chapter on the Virtue of the Soil of Imam Al-Husayn {a.s} and the Sanctuary of His Grave
Chapter on the Virtue of the Soil of Imam Al-Husayn {a.s} and the Sanctuary of His Grave

segments: 3204 - قَالَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : «فِي طِينِ قَبْرِ اَلْحُسَيْنِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ شِفَاءٌ مِنْ كُلِّ دَاءٍ وَ هُوَ اَلدَّوَاءُ اَلْأَكْبَرُ.
arabic.text: 3204 - قَالَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : «فِي طِينِ قَبْرِ اَلْحُسَيْنِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ شِفَاءٌ مِنْ كُلِّ دَاءٍ وَ هُوَ اَلدَّوَاءُ اَلْأَكْبَرُ.

segments:
Hadith.3204 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
"In the clay of the grave of al-Husayn (as) is healing for every ailment, and it is the greatest remedy."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.3204 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
"In the clay of the grave of al-Husayn (as) is healing for every ailment, and it is the greatest remedy."

titles.en: Chapter on the Virtue of the Soil of Imam Al-Husayn {a.s} and the Sanctuary of His Grave

segments: 3205 - وَ قَالَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : «إِذَا أَكَلْتَهُ فَقُلِ اَللَّهُمَّ رَبَّ اَلتُّرْبَةِ اَلْمُبَارَكَةِ وَ رَبَّ اَلْوَصِيِّ اَلَّذِي وَارَتْهُ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ وَ اِجْعَلْهُ عِلْماً نَافِعاً وَ رِزْقاً وَاسِعاً وَ شِفَاءً مِنْ كُلِّ دَاءٍ ».
arabic.text: 3205 - وَ قَالَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : «إِذَا أَكَلْتَهُ فَقُلِ اَللَّهُمَّ رَبَّ اَلتُّرْبَةِ اَلْمُبَارَكَةِ وَ رَبَّ اَلْوَصِيِّ اَلَّذِي وَارَتْهُ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ وَ اِجْعَلْهُ عِلْماً نَافِعاً وَ رِزْقاً وَاسِعاً وَ شِفَاءً مِنْ كُلِّ دَاءٍ ».

segments:
Hadith.3205 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
"When you consume it, say:
'O Allah (swt), Lord (azj) of the blessed soil and Lord (azj) of the Guardian whom it encompasses, send blessings upon Muhammad and the family of Muhammad. Make it beneficial knowledge, abundant sustenance, and a cure for every ailment.'"
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.3205 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
"When you consume it, say:
'O Allah (swt), Lord (azj) of the blessed soil and Lord (azj) of the Guardian whom it encompasses, send blessings upon Muhammad and the family of Muhammad. Make it beneficial knowledge, abundant sustenance, and a cure for every ailment.'"

titles.en: Chapter on the Virtue of the Soil of Imam Al-Husayn {a.s} and the Sanctuary of His Grave

segments: 3206 - وقال الصادق عليه السلام: " حريم قبر الحسين عليه السلام خمسة فراسخ من أربعة جوانب القبر.
arabic.text: 3206 - وقال الصادق عليه السلام: " حريم قبر الحسين عليه السلام خمسة فراسخ من أربعة جوانب القبر.

segments:
Hadith.3206 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
"The sanctuary of the grave of al-Husayn (as) extends five leagues (farsakhs) from the four sides of the grave."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.3206 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
"The sanctuary of the grave of al-Husayn (as) extends five leagues (farsakhs) from the four sides of the grave."

titles.en: Chapter on the Virtue of the Soil of Imam Al-Husayn {a.s} and the Sanctuary of His Grave

segments: : " موضع قبر الحسين عليه السلام منذ يوم دفن [فيه] روضة من رياض الجنة.
arabic.text: : " موضع قبر الحسين عليه السلام منذ يوم دفن [فيه] روضة من رياض الجنة.

segments:
Hadith.3207 - It is narrated by Ishaq ibn Ammar from Abu Abdullah Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) who said:
"The location of the grave of al-Husayn (as) has been a garden from the gardens of Paradise since the day he was buried there."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.3207 - It is narrated by Ishaq ibn Ammar from Abu Abdullah Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) who said:
"The location of the grave of al-Husayn (as) has been a garden from the gardens of Paradise since the day he was buried there."

narratorChain.raw: 3207 - وروي إسحاق بن عمار عن أبي عبد الله عليه السلام قال

parts.text: أبي عبد الله عليه السلام قال

titles.en: Chapter on the Virtue of the Soil of Imam Al-Husayn {a.s} and the Sanctuary of His Grave

segments: 3208 - وقال عليه السلام: " موضع قبر الحسين عليه السلام ترعة من ترع الجنة "
arabic.text: 3208 - وقال عليه السلام: " موضع قبر الحسين عليه السلام ترعة من ترع الجنة "

segments:
Hadith.3208 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
"The location of the grave of al-Husayn (as) is a channel from the channels of Paradise."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.3208 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
"The location of the grave of al-Husayn (as) is a channel from the channels of Paradise."
